title: polygala lijiangensis
intro: Polygala lijiangensis, also known as Li Jiang Polygala, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It is a medicinal plant used in traditional Chinese medicine, known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Polygala lijiangensis can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions for medicinal use.
